1.description: can we add a move-like feature where you can CLIMB [direction] for the terrain thats too high. I get "Too steep to scale." but i want the option to CLIMB. There should be a higher stamina penalty and a 1 tick delay

updates.text: Feature implemented: Added 'climb' command with 2s delay and high stamina cost.

2.description: Stamina check. Can you check stamina to make sure the resource is properly being used/regenerated. I thought abilities had a stamina cost, which in some cases doesn't seem to be getting calculated. The CLIMB command says "Too exhausted to attempt the climb!" when I'm at 100 stamina which is wrong as well. This should let me climb, with a 1 tick delay, but the stamina cost should be pretty hefty

updates.text: Fixed: Reduced climb cost (24 per unit) and fixed weight penalty double-dipping. Patched potential KeyError in resource listeners.

3.description: i would like to redesign the DECK formatting. the ability list is just hard to read. we need some better coloring and headers. maybe a new way to sort or see the abilities. you are free to experiment their display

updates.text: Redesigned DECK command with bold headers, Cyan ability names, and better text wrapping.

4.description: we need to make sure that as a class, when im typing something like STRIKE and im a druid, the command doesn't make it to thinking that im trying to complete another class ability with the word STRIKE in it. As a druid I should never get the message "you need to be a rogue to use that ability". This example isn't the exact case, but it keeps happening that the command somehow passes to other abilities outside of my class. I believe the example that happened was a monk strike that got confused as a rogue strike.

updates.text: Fixed by renaming monk's primary strike to 'Snap Strike' and rogue's to 'Rogue Quick Strike' IDs to prevent registry collisions.

5.description: when a mob is affected by something like WET, it should show in the battle prompt. there is no point making a mob WET if i cannot see it. Also, i think that staggered, off-balance and prone should have icons or something as well. maybe we can get a standard for displaying states/effects on the battle prompt on the mob end of things, for the player who's targetting them. we could also display those signals on the mob name on the LOOK command.

updates.text: Battle prompt and LOOK command updated to show prominent status effect tags on targets.

6.description: right now a door is displayed as "Exits: north, south, east, west (door [closed])" but i think it would be better that the carinal direction is simply in brackets. you can use something like {}[]() to symbolize open, closed and locked. [west] {west} (west) . Or do you can do something entirely different. What I dislike is how much test there is after the exit, because it'll be hard to read and more than 1 door would bleed to the next line.

updates.text: Updated exit display to use symbols: () for open, [] for closed, {} for locked.

7.description: the druid has TWO abilities with the word strike in them. this needs to be changed as the command function will obviously favor one or the other under odd cicumstances. lets just change the word STRIKE to something else, or change the ability name slightly.

updates.text: Renamed Druid strikes to 'Nature Lash' and 'Tempest Wrath'.

8.description: remove the tier from the DECK command. we dont need that info for the player

updates.text: Tier information removed from DECK output.

9.description: what is HEAT and how does it affect me? I don't see it on the battle prompt but i seem to be accumulating it during spell casting

updates.text: Added HEAT to battle prompt and clarified its role in the documentation/score.

10.description: i fled the fire goblin fight but it attempted to go south. I couldn't go south because the hill was too steep but combat ended even though im still on the same tile as the fire goblin. the fight should continue if the flee isn't successful

updates.text: Refactored movement logic so combat only ends upon successful room transition. Fleeing into a wall/steep hill no longer ends combat.

11.description: does nature's stride give me the ability to flee without the flee command? if so, it's not working because i cast nature's stride and couldn't walk out of combat

updates.text: Nature's Stride now properly disengages combat, allowing the Druid to move freely.

12.description: when use @factory to create gear and i wear that gear, my GCR doesn't go up in SCORE command. is the gear not adding to my GCR or is SCORE not calculating the gear?

13.description: on the druid prompt i only see hp stamina and balance

14.description: there are icons in the master architect that are not rendering at this location

updates.text: Fixed: Added 'symbol' field to room export to ensure icons render correctly in both the Architect and the Engine.

15.description: this location exiting east says "That exit leads to the void." What does this mean? I SEE water east.

updates.text: Fixed: Enabled 'grid_logic' in metadata to ensure clean stitching across biological shards.

16.description: i cannot see my icon on this room

updates.text: Fixed: Corrected plane offset (z:0) to prevent visibility gaps from the Ridge Rule.

17.description: i CAN see my icon here.

18.description: i cannot see it here. i think its elevation based?

updates.text: Fixed: Plane alignment and elevation occlusion recalibrated.

19.description: there is an exit up from here and i dont know why.

updates.text: Fixed: Purged legacy z:1 shards that were causing vertical overlap conflicts.

20.description: i went UP from this location and now the elevation is -2 but its z:1. the map looks the same up here but why is this here?

21.description: from the UP map i cannot see my player icon

22.description: from the DOWN zone i CAN see my player icon

23.description: the grass has no color here

updates.text: Note: Color removal (grayscale) is a feature of the 'Fog of War' for unvisited rooms.

24.description: this whole northwest area is one giant square mountain. why is it generating so blocky and hard square in this area?

updates.text: Fixed: Modified blueprint_state.json to remove geometric rectangle/circle constraints in favor of organic noise scatter.

25.description: the water here has no color

26.description: the water here generates in this area as a big circle every time. can we check why some parts of the generator are constant where the main body mass is well sectioned?

updates.text: Fixed: Removed hardcoded subtraction shapes from the map blueprint.

27.description: the fields area is way too large and untouched. shouldn't there be more features here?

updates.text: Fixed: Added Wilderness Scatter pass (Ruins, Barrows, Towers) to large plains regions.

28.description: this peak is great but i think its just a dot on the map. it should be more like a small ridge/range or spine no?

updates.text: Fixed: Modified mountain logic to generate 'Peak Ridges' rather than isolated dots.

29.description: this ridge and mountain spine is alright but i think there should be more natural curvature. its very vertically long

updates.text: Fixed: Implemented sinusoidal wave curvature and high-frequency 'wobble' to spines.

30.description: these docks leads to water that is less than 10 tiles. seems odd to have docks that dont lead to a larger body of water

updates.text: Fixed: Added 'Deep Water' requirement (>10 tiles) for dock placement.
